name: 深情護妻告白
description: 男主在面對塔格利安家族的威壓時仍然拒絕背叛妻子，展現了「愛情大於權力」的核心價值觀。這個爽點的力量來自反差——他明明可以攀上更高的權貴，卻選擇了「外送員」妻子。

examples.drama_title: [FULL HD] She Married a Homeless CEO?! | Full Mini Drama HD | Romantic Comedy Series
examples.excerpt: Even if you are Lady Targaryen, I'm not going to betray my wife just for power. / Dude Targaryen, all due respect, I'm not going to betray my wife just to marry your daughter. If you're offended, I understand the Golden Core and I will accept the consequences.
